subject: fix(pwa): bump CACHE_VERSION to v9 to bootstrap version.json detection
body:
Existing installed PWAs need a SW change to trigger the update button
and receive the new version.json-based detection code. After this
deploy, future app-only updates will be detected via version.json
independently of sw.js changes.

Tags: pwa, deploy
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: debug-system
Semver: patch
